clusters.justification: This cluster captures the broad macroscopic axis governing emotional reactivity, autonomic arousal, and subjective mood states typically driven by limbic and salience network co-activations.

These terms collectively describe the overarching neuroeconomic functions of incentive salience, reinforcement learning, and cost-benefit decision-making anchored in dopaminergic corticostriatal circuitry.

This domain encompasses the high-level integration of self-referential thought, autobiographical memory, and the representation of social agents (others) predominantly subserved by default mode network architectures.
